name: Rental Contract - Generate Billing Schedule
script:
frequency_map = {
    "Monthly": 1,
    "Quarterly": 3,
    "Half-Yearly": 6,
    "Yearly": 12
}
months = frequency_map.get(doc.billing_frequency, 1)
start = doc.contract_start_date
end = doc.contract_end_date
period_start = start
while period_start < end:
    period_end = frappe.utils.add_months(period_start, months)
    period_end = frappe.utils.add_days(period_end, -1)
    if period_end > end:
        period_end = end
    if doc.billing_type == "Advance":
        scheduled_date = period_start
    else:
        scheduled_date = period_end
    bs = frappe.new_doc("Billing Schedule")
    bs.rental_contract = doc.name
    bs.customer = doc.customer
    bs.scheduled_date = scheduled_date
    bs.billing_amount = doc.billing_amount
    bs.period_start = period_start
    bs.period_end = period_end
    bs.status = "Pending"
    bs.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
    period_start = frappe.utils.add_months(period_start, months)
